---
title: "ekstra_kontakt"
subtitle: "`ekstra_kontakt`"
description: "ekstra_kontakt"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/ekstra_kontakt/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                        | Title                                                                           | Type    | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|---------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                                     | The unique name of the event                                                    | string  | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `center`                                    | Research center                                                                 | string  | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `contact_date`                              | contact_date                                                                    | date    | Date of the extra contact. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `contact_type`                              | contact_type                                                                    | string  | If the extra contact was conducted in person, by telephone, by live video in Liva Health, by video in Liva Health or by message in Liva Health. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                             |
| `contact_staffinitials`                     | contact_staffinitials                                                           | string  | The name or initials of the staff member. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `contact_who`                               | contact_who                                                                     | string  | Whether the contact was initiated by the participant or by staff member. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                    |
| `contact_reason_specification`              | contact_reason_specification                                                    | string  | Specification of reason to contact due to no training completion. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                           |
| `contact_reason_blood_glucose`              | contact_reason_blood_glucose                                                    | string  | Description of how glyceamic threshold is met. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                                              |
| `contact_reason_blood_glucose_intervention` | contact_reason_blood_glucose_intervention                                       | string  | Challenges with adherence to the intervention, whether diet or training. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                    |
| `contact_bs_participant`                    | contact_bs_participant                                                          | string  | Participant contacted regarding initiation of glucose lowering medication via the responsible physician. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                    |
| `contact_bs_responsible_physician`          | contact_bs_responsible_physician                                                | string  | Contact made with responsible physisian regarding blood glucose. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                            |
| `contact_bp_participant`                    | contact_bp_participant                                                          | string  | Participant contacted regarding initiation of antihypertensive treatment via the responsible physician. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                     |
| `contact_bp_responsible_physician`          | contact_bp_responsible_physician                                                | string  | Contact made with responsible physisian regarding blood pressure. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                           |
| `contact_reason_other`                      | contact_reason_other                                                            | string  | If others, describe reason for contact with the participant. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                                |
| `contact_direct_time`                       | contact_direct_time                                                             | string  | Select the 5-minute interval that best reflects the total combined time spent in direct contact with the participant (telephone, video consultation, or in-person visit). Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                   |
| `contact_administration_time`               | contact_administration_time                                                     | string  | Select the 5-minute interval that best reflects the total time spent on administrative tasks related to this specific contact with the participant (documentation, scheduling, emails, coordination, etc.). Extra contact. Repeated instrument. |
| `contact_summary`                           | contact_summary                                                                 | string  | Description of the reason for the extra contact and what is discussed. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                      |
| `contact_reason___1`                        | Alarm fra Dietary Screener                                                      | boolean | Explains the reason behind the contact. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `contact_reason___2`                        | Alarm ift. at deltageren ikke overholder træningsinterventionen                 | boolean | Explains the reason behind the contact. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `contact_reason___3`                        | Blodsukker målt for højt (HbA1c eller blodsukker målt ved fingerprik eller CGM) | boolean | Explains the reason behind the contact. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `contact_reason___4`                        | Blodtryk målt for højt                                                          | boolean | Explains the reason behind the contact. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `contact_reason___5`                        | Andet                                                                           | boolean | Explains the reason behind the contact. Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `contact_reason_blood_pressure___1`         | Systolisk BT > 140 mmHg over 1 uge                                              | boolean | Blood pressure criterion met (systolic > 140 mmHg or diastolic > 90 mmHg). Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                  |
| `contact_reason_blood_pressure___2`         | Diastolisk BT > 90 mmHg over 1 uge                                              | boolean | Blood pressure criterion met (systolic > 140 mmHg or diastolic > 90 mmHg). Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                  |
| `contact_reason_blood_pressure___3`         | Systolisk BT > 140 mmHg over 2 uger                                             | boolean | Blood pressure criterion met (systolic > 140 mmHg or diastolic > 90 mmHg). Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                  |
| `contact_reason_blood_pressure___4`         | Diastolisk BT > 90 mmHg over 2 uger                                             | boolean | Blood pressure criterion met (systolic > 140 mmHg or diastolic > 90 mmHg). Extra contact. Repeated instrument.                                                                                                                                  |

: Fields in the `ekstra_kontakt` resource.
